convert.description: Regenerate JS data modules from XML sources
convert.template: Run `npm run convert` to regenerate all data/*.js files from knowledge/xml/*.xml. If any errors occur, diagnose and fix them.

verify.description: Run full verification pipeline: convert, test, typecheck, lint
verify.template:
Run the full verification pipeline in sequence:
1. `npm run convert`
2. `npm test`
3. `npm run typecheck`
4. `npm run lint:check`

If any step fails, stop and report the error. Do not proceed to the next step until the current one passes.
